---
title: "Writing"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1>Writing</h1>
</div>

<!-- <p class="blog-intro">
  The common thread: what does it mean to measure something, and when does measurement go wrong?
</p> -->

<div style="max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1.5rem 4rem;">

  <div class="blog-stub">
    <span class="coming-soon-tag">Coming soon</span>
    <h3>Why bootstrapping?</h3>
    <p>
      Why effect size estimation trumps NHST.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="blog-stub">
    <span class="coming-soon-tag">Coming soon</span>
    <h3>What is a behavioural state?</h3>
    <p>
      On why &ldquo;feeding behaviour&rdquo; is not one thing. The conceptual problem of defining
      a state from its behavioural signatures &mdash; and why this matters for both neuroscientists and more.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- <div class="blog-stub">
    <span class="coming-soon-tag">Coming soon</span>
    <h3>Four agents arguing about a manuscript</h3>
    <p>
      What I learned about evaluation design when there is no ground truth. On adversarial
      pipelines, the LLM-as-Judge problem, and why inter-rater agreement is the metric
      I keep returning to.
    </p>
  </div> -->

  <!-- <div class="blog-stub">
    <span class="coming-soon-tag">Coming soon</span>
    <h3>The failure mode that connects fruit flies and language models</h3>
    <p>
      Optimising individual metrics while missing the underlying state. The common structure
      of goodhart&rsquo;s law violations in neuroscience, AI benchmarking, and statistics.
      And what multidimensional, reference-anchored evaluation does about it.
    </p>
  </div> -->

</div>
```
